name: @zintent/neon-pack
description: Official ZINTENT plugin for cyberpunk/neon aesthetics and glowing intents.
author: ZINTENT Core Team

intent-glow.css: filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px var(--zi-neon-color, var(--zi-accent-primary))); transition: filter 0.3s ease;
intent-glow.description: Adds a customizable glowing drop shadow.

text-neon.css: color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 0 5px #fff, 0 0 10px #fff, 0 0 20px var(--zi-neon-color, var(--zi-accent-primary)), 0 0 40px var(--zi-neon-color, var(--zi-accent-primary));

btn-neon.css: background: transparent; border: 2px solid var(--zi-neon-color, var(--zi-accent-primary)); color: var(--zi-neon-color, var(--zi-accent-primary)); box-shadow: inset 0 0 10px var(--zi-neon-color, var(--zi-accent-primary)), 0 0 20px var(--zi-neon-color, var(--zi-accent-primary)); text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: bold;
